description: Tourism analytics discovered that attraction records in demodb lack a denormalized VisitCount field required by the new ranked-query API. Using OrientDB Studio at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html (credentials: root / GymAnything123!), update the Attractions class in demodb to include a VisitCount property calculated from incoming HasVisited edges. Ensure all attraction records are updated with their visit counts and create an AttractionVisitAudit record for every attraction that has at least one visit.
